prompt: Using the composition of the reference image, generate an image featuring a hand holding a device outdoors. Display a detailed computer graphics rendering of a complex 3D CAD model on the screen of the device.
prompt_refined: Create an image that emulates the composition and perspective of image 1. It should feature a human hand holding a white smartphone outdoors against a natural green foliage background. On the screen of the smartphone, display a highly detailed, realistic computer graphics rendering of a complex 3D CAD model, such as an intricate mechanical assembly or an architectural structure.
objects: highly detailed, realistic computer graphics rendering of a complex 3D CAD model (e.g., intricate mechanical assembly or architectural structure) on the smartphone screen
